name: devcycle
description: Opinionated pipeline from a feature, bug, or refactor description to a verified, publish-ready implementation: scoped interview, spec, wave-based plan, TDD subagent execution, branch review, on-device verification.

gitPolicy.title: Git policy
gitPolicy.description: What the finish stage may do with the branch. One of: local-commits-only, push-allowed, open-pr.

implementerModel.title: Implementer model
implementerModel.description: Model for implementer subagents; every dispatch passes its model explicitly.

branchReviewModel.title: Branch review model
branchReviewModel.description: Model for the whole-branch review gate.

reviewDepth.title: Review depth
reviewDepth.description: Branch review engine. One of: single (code-review pass plus spec-compliance layer), panel (multi-lens review panel workflow).

crossModelReview.title: Cross-model review
crossModelReview.description: Add a cross-model lens to the review panel when available.

onDeviceGate.title: On-device gate
onDeviceGate.description: Whether the on-device checklist closes only via a human walkthrough. One of: human-required, auto-ok.
